description: CompositionBlack unisex sandals made of lightweight, form fitting odour resistant EVAWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLeap into summer with these well ventilated pair of black clogs from crocs. The croslite footbed provides ergonomic Fit and comfort and the sandals give superior shock absorption making it a perfect pair for a day on the beach or for urban wear. The ankle straps ensure a snug fit, while the small holes on the uppers can accommodate quite a few jibbitz. The leaf pattern on the outsole gives superior grip keeping your feet safe from injuries.Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmelzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for holes in crocs sandals.
